title: Dekton 71 PC Cable Manager Set- Complete Cable Management Kit| Includes Cable Ties, Clips, and Organizers| Durable & Adjustable| Ideal for Home, Office, and Workshop| Tidy and Neat Cable Organization
features: Comprehensive Set: The Dekton 71 PC Cable Manager Set includes an extensive range of cable management solutions to meet all your organizational needs. The kit features 40 cable ties, 20 cable clips, and 10 cable organizers, providing everything you need for a clutter-free environment.

Durable and Adjustable: Constructed from high-quality materials, each component of this cable management set is designed for durability and flexibility. The adjustable cable ties can be customized to secure cables of varying sizes, ensuring a reliable and long-lasting organization solution.

Tidy and Neat Organization: Say goodbye to tangled and messy cables. With the Dekton Cable Manager Set, you can keep your cables neatly organized and easily accessible. The cable clips and organizers help prevent tangling and ensure that your workspace remains clean and efficient.

Enhanced Safety: By keeping cables neatly organized, the Dekton Cable Manager Set helps reduce the risk of accidental tripping and damage to cables. Protect your equipment and maintain a safe environment with this comprehensive cable management solution.

Versatile Use: Perfect for use in multiple settings, this cable management kit is ideal for home, office, and workshop environments. Whether you're organizing cables behind your home entertainment system, at your desk, or in your workshop, this set offers versatile solutions for a tidy setup.
description: The Dekton 71 PC Cable Manager Set is your ultimate solution for achieving a tidy and organized space with efficient cable management. This comprehensive kit includes an array of essential tools designed to keep your cables, wires, and cords neatly organized in any setting. With 71 pieces in total, the set features a diverse assortment of cable ties, clips, and organizers, ensuring you have everything needed to tackle clutter and maintain a streamlined environment. The set includes high-quality cable ties that offer a secure hold while allowing for easy adjustments, making them perfect for bundling and securing multiple cables together. These ties are durable and designed to withstand everyday wear and tear, providing long-lasting performance. Complementing the ties are versatile cable clips that attach to surfaces, helping to route and secure cables in place, preventing them from tangling or becoming damaged. The assortment of cable organizers included in the set helps to keep cables neatly separated and accessible, reducing the risk of accidental unplugging or tangling. Designed for use in various environments, the Dekton Cable Manager Set is ideal for home, office, and workshop settings. Whether you’re organizing cables behind your entertainment center, managing wires under your desk, or setting up a clean workspace in your workshop, this kit provides the flexibility and tools needed for a neat and efficient setup.
